                  <div class="coh-container ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-07737319-cf7f-4243-971f-60a9025df278 coh-component-instance-07737319-cf7f-4243-971f-60a9025df278 section coh-style-padding-top-bottom-medium  content-bg-pattern content-bg-pattern--wave bg-gradient bg-gradient--secondary ssa-instance-3cb2050c9227cd5f54cc535db6c51517 coh-ce-cpt_section-da8823c1" >  <div class="coh-container container  ssa-instance-3cb2050c9227cd5f54cc535db6c51517 coh-ce-cpt_section-a96678af coh-container-boxed" >               <h2 class="coh-heading ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-2c304b79-2d06-40d9-9b81-bc52df5255ef coh-component-instance-2c304b79-2d06-40d9-9b81-bc52df5255ef  ssa-instance-7cb97378ad1d60db7e43d5b68b6e0cd2 coh-ce-cpt_heading-66a3abd3" > Bringing the Fun to the Run!  </h2> 
                <div class="coh-wysiwyg ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-5c977bd1-986e-489f-97ca-279fc50a0f8a coh-component-instance-5c977bd1-986e-489f-97ca-279fc50a0f8a  coh-style-text-color-dark-background        ssa-instance-adea327d45f394a507a045bb682719c4 coh-ce-cpt_text-fa10298a"  >    <p class="text-align-center">The Rock ‘n’ Roll Running Series was the first to flip the script by infusing running with music, energy, and entertainment. What started as a bold idea has grown into a global movement, with epic courses in iconic destinations and a finish line that transforms into a music festival. From 5Ks to marathons, there’s a distance for everyone and a community that brings unmatched energy. Where runners, music lovers, and finish line chasers come together for an unforgettable race experience.&nbsp;</p> </div> 
   </div> </div>

 </div>  <div class="coh-container panel panel__cta coh-ce-cpt_image_and_cta_panel-4577181d" >  <div class="coh-container texts-wrapper" >       <h2 class="coh-heading title"  > 2025-2026 Heavy Medals </h2>         <p class="coh-paragraph description coh-ce-cpt_image_and_cta_panel-a586471a"  >Enroll in our FREE Heavy Medals Program to earn extra BLING!  Run two or more marathons or half marathons with Rock ‘n’ Roll Running Series during the 2025-2026 calendar years to earn Heavy Medals #2 up to #10. Enroll online today, cross the finish line, and start collecting Heavy Medals at the Heavy Medals Booth at the Finish Line Festival. The more events you complete, the more bling you collect!</p>               <div class="coh-container ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-d42451bd-333c-4390-a078-e114388e40ed coh-component-instance-d42451bd-333c-4390-a078-e114388e40ed coh-ce-cpt_pro_conditional_container-a586471a" >                <a href="/medals/heavy-medals" class="coh-link ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-d42451bd-333c-4390-a078-e114388e40ed coh-component-instance-d42451bd-333c-4390-a078-e114388e40ed button button--secondary  width-fit" target="_self" > Find out more    </a> 
   </div>

     <h2 class="coh-heading title"  > Tourpass Now Available </h2>         <p class="coh-paragraph description coh-ce-cpt_image_and_cta_panel-a586471a"  >Now available:<br />
<br />
2024 TourPass is your ticket to a year&#039;s worth of running adventures. Whether you&#039;re running your favorites, collecting all the race bling, or looking to rock the entire series, there&#039;s a TourPass just for you!</p>               <div class="coh-container ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-cae9e7a3-8d46-49bb-b7ff-740189031f50 coh-component-instance-cae9e7a3-8d46-49bb-b7ff-740189031f50 coh-ce-cpt_pro_conditional_container-a586471a" >                <a href="/home" class="coh-link ssa-component coh-component ssa-component-instance-cae9e7a3-8d46-49bb-b7ff-740189031f50 coh-component-instance-cae9e7a3-8d46-49bb-b7ff-740189031f50 button button--secondary  width-fit" target="_self" > Register Now    </a>
